topic: A person mailing a letter at a blue USPS mailbox.

parsed_generation.script:
[00:00-00:02] Shot 1: Establishing shot of a person approaching a blue USPS mailbox on a sidewalk - Camera: Wide shot, Framing: Wide, Movement: Static, Subject: Single person.
[00:02-00:05] Shot 2: The person stands at the mailbox and inserts a letter - Camera: Eye-level, Framing: Medium, Movement: Slow tracking, Subject: Single person.
[00:05-00:08] Shot 3: Close-up on the hand of the single person posting the letter into the blue USPS mailbox - Camera: Close-up, Framing: Close, Movement: Static, Subject: Single person.
parsed_generation.narration: In Shot 1, a single person approaches a blue USPS mailbox on the sidewalk, establishing the setting for mailing a letter. In Shot 2, at eye level and a medium distance, the person reaches the mailbox and slides the letter inside, a deliberate, everyday action. In Shot 3, a close-up captures the hand posting the letter into the blue USPS mailbox, signaling completion of the mailing. The sequence centers on the single subject and the blue mailbox, clearly conveying the act of mailing a letter.

feedback: The sequence covers the core action of mailing a letter at a blue USPS mailbox and maintains a single-subject focus. However, it diverges from the gold standard by using three shots instead of two and by not mentioning the envelope color or the slot-closing moment; the narration could more strongly emphasize the mail drop moment. To tighten alignment, reduce to two clearly distinct actions, mention a white envelope, and include the slot opening/clanging moment.
strengths: Clear, camera-based shot structure with defined angles.
Maintains single subject and mailbox as focal point.
fixes: Match the two-shot structure of the gold standard (handing envelope to mailbox, then slot closes).
Explicitly describe the envelope (white) and the slot action with sound for stronger alignment.
